channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bassilyo shares his learnings from working with Direk Coco Martin on Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal
item.description: Rapper Bassilyo recently opened up about his experiences working with renowned director Coco Martin during the production of 'Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal.' In an interview, he expressed how much he has ...

item.title: Official Lotto Results for May 2, 2026 Released by ABS-CBN
item.description: ABS-CBN News published the official Lotto results for May 2, 2026. The article provides readers with the latest winning numbers from the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) for various Lotto ...

item.title: Vernon Restaurant Introduces AI Devices to Assist in Food Preparation
item.description: Royal Garden, Vernon's oldest Chinese restaurant, has recently installed two AI-powered machines from Botinkit to assist in preparing stir fries, chow mein, and chop suey dishes in just a few minutes....

item.title: CIA report reveals Bin Laden planned to relocate months before Abbottabad raid
item.description: A newly released CIA report has shed light on how Osama bin Laden nearly managed to leave his Abbottabad hideout months before the US Navy SEAL operation in May 2011. According to documents recovered ...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Critiques Ruto, Outlines 2027 Opposition Alliance
item.description: Former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua has intensified his political attacks on President William Ruto, promising to 'teach him a lesson in politics' ahead of the 2027 general elections. Speaking at...

item.title: Kibabii University student Delvine Cheyech dies after falling ill post-attachment
item.description: A tragic loss has struck West Pokot County as Delvine Cheyech, a third-year student at Kibabii University, passed away after falling ill following the completion of her attachment. Cheyech had been be...

item.title: Lawyer challenges transfer of Islamabad High Court judges in Peshawar HC
item.description: On Saturday, a lawyer approached the Peshawar High Court (PHC) to contest the recent transfer of three Islamabad High Court (IHC) judges to other provincial high courts. Advocate Hastham Khan Khalil s...

item.title: Oilers GM Bowman Signals Roster Changes for Next Season
item.description: Edmonton Oilers general manager Stan Bowman has indicated that the team's roster will undergo changes for the upcoming NHL season. Speaking after the Oilers were eliminated in the first round of the p...

item.title: Why Nigeria Needs Stronger Foundations for Education Reform
item.description: For many years, Nigeria don dey waka from one education policy to another, but nothing dey really work. Now, the Federal Government wan introduce the Learners’ Identification Number (LIN) to track pri...

item.title: Reflections on the Lord’s Prayer and Its Meaning in Daily Life
item.description: Barney Zwartz reflects on the significance of prayer in Christianity, inspired by his own journey as an adult convert. He contrasts his perspective with that of the Australian philosopher Rai Gaita, w...

item.title: Committee Probes Clash Between BJP MLA and Officials in Rajasthan
item.description: A fact-finding committee, set up by the BJP government, visited Sriganganagar in northern Rajasthan on May 2, 2026, to investigate a clash between BJP MLA Jaideep Bihani and government officials durin...

item.title: Rising Oil Prices Could Slow Pakistan’s Economic Growth in FY27
item.description: Pakistan is facing renewed economic pressures as oil prices continue to climb, largely due to the ongoing Middle East conflict. Analysts warn that if the situation persists, inflation in Pakistan may ...

item.title: Adamson and National U secure Final 4 spots in UAAP men's 3x3 basketball
item.description: In the UAAP men's 3x3 basketball tournament, Adamson University and National University have officially secured the remaining slots for the Final 4. Their victories in the preliminary rounds have ensu...

item.title: Humpback Whale Successfully Released into Open Waters After Baltic Sea Stranding
item.description: A humpback whale, nicknamed Timmy by German media, has been safely released into the North Sea after being stranded in shallow waters near Germany's Baltic Sea coast since early March. Initially far f...

item.title: Oilers GM Stan Bowman admits team needs adjustments after playoff exit
item.description: Edmonton Oilers general manager Stan Bowman acknowledged that the team will need to make changes in the coming season following their early elimination from the NHL playoffs. While Bowman highlighted ...

item.title: Parliament Raises Concerns Over Lax Discipline and Poor Conditions at Nelspruit Prison
item.description: Parliament’s Portfolio Committee on Correctional Services has raised serious concerns following an oversight visit to the Nelspruit Correctional Centre in Mpumalanga. The visit formed part of a broade...

item.title: Sassa’s 20-Year Impact on Social Support for Vulnerable South Africans
item.description: Twenty years after its establishment in April 2006, the South African Social Security Agency (Sassa) has grown from a fragmented provincial system to a unified national body providing crucial support ...

item.title: Government conducts nationwide test of real-time disaster alert system
item.description: On Saturday, lakhs of mobile users across India received a sudden 'Extremely Severe Alert' as part of a nationwide drill for the new Cell Broadcast Alert System. The alert caused panic in several plac...

item.title: Should AI Be Used to Re-write Literary Classics?
item.description: A new AI tool developed by Character.ai allows users to interact with and even alter famous public domain novels, including classics like *Pride and Prejudice* and *Frankenstein*. While interactive st...

item.title: Quezon City collaborates with TikTok and PCCI to support MSME growth
item.description: The Quezon City government has teamed up with the popular short-form video platform TikTok and the Philippine Chamber of Commerce and Industry-Quezon City (PCCI-QC) to provide support and training for...
